name: oatpad
description: Search Oatpad meetings by title, fetch one by id, pull every meeting in a date range, or schedule a new meeting for a future slot.
long_description: Reads `.oats` meeting files written by the Oatpad macOS app from its application data directory and exposes them as MCP tools. The read tools support title search (matching Oatpad's sidebar — note text is not searched) and date filters. The bundle can also write a fresh `.oats` file to schedule a new meeting at a specific time — Oatpad picks scheduled meetings up the next time it reads the meetings directory. Existing meetings are never modified.

tools.name: list_meetings
tools.description: Search and list Oatpad meeting summaries with optional title query, date range, and limit. Newest first.

tools.name: get_meeting
tools.description: Retrieve a single Oatpad meeting by id.

tools.name: get_meetings_in_range
tools.description: Retrieve full meeting JSON for every Oatpad meeting whose effective time falls within an ISO 8601 datetime range.

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Create a new Oatpad meeting planned for a specific time, with a title and optional notetaker.
